title: Conservation Triage Explained
script_summary: A concise explanation of conservation triage and its complexities.

segments.voiceover: Ever heard of conservation triage? It’s not what you think.
Conservation triage prioritizes efforts where they matter most. But it’s messy. Why? Because uncertainty reigns.
Imagine saving a species but losing another. How do we choose? Scientists weigh extinction risks and ecological impact.
Research shows that investing in certain habitats can save more species in the long run. But the right data is crucial.
Conservation triage isn’t just a buzzword. It’s a science guiding hard choices for our planet’s future.
Want to dive deeper into conservation? Hit that follow button!
